executives.name: Harry Barr
executives.background: Mr. Barr has been the Chairman and CEO of the Company since its inception. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and has guided several companies from inception to production.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, Chairman, President & Chief Executive Officer
